scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.install:linters: npm i -D eslint@^9.7 eslint-plugin-unicorn eslint-plugin-react eslint-plugin-check-file
scripts.install:formatters: npm i -D prettier eslint-config-prettier stylelint stylelint-config-standard
scripts.install:bundler: npm i -D webpack webpack-cli webpack-dev-server html-webpack-plugin esbuild-loader style-loader css-loader
scripts.install:devDeps: npm run install:linters && npm run install:formatters && npm run install:bundler
scripts.presetup: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.git', { recursive: true, force: true })" && git init
scripts.setup: npm run install:deps && npm run install:devDeps
